title: keraselma pungens
intro: Keraselma pungens, also known as Plectritis congesta, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Keraselma pungens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Keraselma pungens can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
